summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that LLY is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $901.99. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 71.4%. The asset has recently tested this support 3 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $1062.55 and a significant trendline confluence around $951.83 (formed by 12 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
